_source: AUTHORED copy + logic-derived labels, not recorded numbers: profile has no summed computed values like planner's shopping list. The stat DOORS are asserted by label (cooked/saved/yours); the yours count renders '—' until the cookbook exposes an own-recipe count (packet contract_gap). Unit segments + FAQ/club copy are the authored strings the screens render verbatim.

faq.title: Little questions
faq.expect: Where do Otto’s recipes come from?
